description: Evaluates container management maturity—service governance, KPIs/KRIs, lifecycle policies, container management and orchestration software, resource management, and container security.

capabilities.name: Service exists and is in good condition
capabilities.description: A container management service exists, is scoped appropriately, and is reviewed for efficacy.
evaluation_focus: Enterprise container management service exists
Frequent container management service efficacy review

capabilities.name: KPIs/KRIs
capabilities.description: Container management KPIs and KRIs are formalized, documented, and reviewed frequently.
evaluation_focus: Documented KPIs and KRIs for container management
Frequent KPI/KRI review

capabilities.name: Container testing, development and deployment policies
capabilities.description: Enterprise-wide container management and lifecycle policies apply across the organization and are reviewed frequently.
evaluation_focus: Enterprise-wide container management and lifecycle policies
Enterprise-wide policy application
Frequent container management policy review

capabilities.name: Container management software
capabilities.description: Container management and orchestration software manages container infrastructure enterprise-wide, automates lifecycle, is reviewed frequently, and integrates with asset, vulnerability, and compliance systems.
evaluation_focus: Container management software for container infrastructure
Enterprise-specific or multi-type orchestrator deployment
Automated container lifecycle management
Frequent container management and orchestration configuration review
Integration with asset, vulnerability, and compliance management systems

capabilities.name: Container Resource management
capabilities.description: The container management system performs efficient resource management based on policies for all or critical containers with automated deployment of best practices.
evaluation_focus: Efficient resource management based on container policies
Resource management scope for all or critical containers
Automated resource management practices

capabilities.name: Container Security
capabilities.description: Container security deploys function-specific controls across the ecosystem, supports automated response to compromises and policy changes, is reviewed frequently, and may be native or integrated with external providers.
evaluation_focus: Function-specific security for container systems
Container security scope across ecosystem or specific vendors
Automated container security deployment
Frequent container security practice review
Native or externally integrated container security features

evaluation.resiliency_weight_policy: Ask stakeholder for per-capability weights when adding a new evaluation service. This service uses weight 1 for all capabilities.
evaluation.pillar_policy: Some services may have no Technology capabilities; in those cases, do not compute or report a Technology pillar score.
